Class JmlAssert

de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.statement.JavaStatement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.statement.JmlAssert
All Implemented Interfaces:
ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, Statement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
public class JmlAssert extends JavaStatement
A JML assert statement.
